---
name: Good First Issue
about: A short task that's good for first-time contributors. If you pick this, comment that you're working on it.
title: "Good first issue: [short description]"
labels: good first issue

---

## Description
<!-- Provide a clear description of the exact task. -->
Describe the small change or bug to fix. Keep it focused and include steps to reproduce if applicable.

## Why This Matters
<!-- Explain how this fits into the system. -->
How this fits into the larger system or improves the user experience.

## Setup
<!-- Go through these steps. -->
1. Clone the repo
2. Follow `CONTRIBUTING.md` to run locally

## Acceptance Criteria
<!-- What must be completed for this issue to be closed? -->
- [ ] Clear steps to verify
- [ ] Tests added or manual verification steps provided

Assign yourself by commenting below before starting.
